name: @runtimed/node-linux-x64-gnu
description: Linux x64 GNU native binding for @runtimed/node

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('runtimed-node.linux-x64-gnu.node')) { console.error('Run pnpm --dir packages/runtimed-node assemble:platform before packing @runtimed/node-linux-x64-gnu.'); process.exit(1); }"
